mainText:
Welcome to Bank of Entitlement, where your worth is our currency and your privilege is our priority. Sign up now and experience the VIP treatment you deserve!

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So, picture this: I walk into a coffee shop, ready to start my day as the magnanimous CEO of Bank of Entitlement. I confidently stride over to the counter, flashing my gold card, expecting to be greeted like the royalty I am. But what do I see? The barista has the audacity to take the order of a regular customer before me! Can you believe it?I felt a surge of entitlement rising within me, and I couldn't let this injustice stand. I tap my foot impatiently, making it clear that MY time is valuable. Finally, the barista turns to me, and I let out a heavy sigh of disapproval. I order my usual drink with an extra shot of entitlement, making sure to emphasize my importance with each word.As I wait for my order, I notice they've misspelled my name on the cup. The nerve! I demand to see the manager, ready to unleash the full force of my entitlement. The manager arrives, apologizing profusely, but it's not enough. I demand a full refund, a free drink voucher for my next visit, and a public apology broadcasted throughout the shop.After some back and forth, they finally comply with my demands, knowing that crossing paths with Hot Josh, the CEO of Bank of Entitlement, was a mistake they'll never make again. And as I walk out of the coffee shop, victorious and vindicated, I can't help but revel in the sweet taste of entitlement, knowing that I had asserted my dominance once more.
